name: China National Electric Apparatus Research Institute Co., Ltd.
summary: China National Electric Apparatus Research Institute Co., Ltd. operates as a science and technology company that specializes in the scientific research and development, science and technology service, and science and technological industry development activities. It offers science and technology services in the areas of energy, materials, engineering, intelligence, evaluation, and environment. The company also provides testing and evaluation services for household appliances, electrical accessories, lighting products, toys and children's products, motor vehicles and related components, batteries, materials, compressors, electrical machines, electric welding machines, internal combustion engines, and others. In addition, it offers excitation devices, high power supplies, battery and equipment test products, and household appliances and related components, as well as fine chemical and electrical insulation materials, such as polyester resins, powder coatings, and oil paints. Further, it provides equipment testing and technical services for household appliances plants; coating production line services by powder and paint; plating, processing production line by electroplate, and aluminum oxidation coloring surfaces; and waste water and waste gas processing equipment. Additionally, the company offers industrial products, including energy equipment, test equipment, production line, surface preparation, and chemical painting products. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
